title: SWEC iEEG Dataset
description: A fully anonymized long-term intracranial EEG dataset from 40 patients with pharmacoresistant epilepsy recorded at the Sleep-Wake-Epilepsy-Center, University of Bern. The dataset comprises 5376 hours of continuous iEEG with 381 annotated electrographic seizures, sampled at 512 or 1024 Hz and preprocessed with band-pass filtering and median referencing. This resource supports development and validation of seizure detection and neuronal activity modeling algorithms.
methods_description: Intracranial strip, grid, and depth electrodes were recorded with 16-bit analog-to-digital conversion at 512 Hz or 1024 Hz sampling rate. Data were digitally band-pass filtered (0.5–150 Hz, 4th-order Butterworth, zero-phase) and median-referenced across channels. Artifact-contaminated channels were removed at source. Seizure onsets and offsets were annotated by a board-certified epileptologist.
